sn26.6:1.1: Sāvatthinidānaṁ. "Yo kho, bhikkhave, rūpasaññāya uppādo ṭhiti … pe … jarāmaraṇassa pātubhāvo … pe … yo dhammasaññāya uppādo ṭhiti abhinibbatti pātubhāvo, dukkhasseso uppādo, rogānaṁ ṭhiti, jarāmaraṇassa pātubhāvo.
sn26.6:1.2: Yo ca kho, bhikkhave, rūpasaññāya nirodho … pe … jarāmaraṇassa atthaṅgamo … pe … yo dhammasaññāya nirodho vūpasamo atthaṅgamo, dukkhasseso nirodho, rogānaṁ vūpasamo, jarāmaraṇassa atthaṅgamo"ti.
